title: thymus serpyllum subsp. ayachicus
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. ayachicus, also known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen herb native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum subsp. ayachicus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
